title: bursera crenata
intro: Bursera crenata, also known as the Mexican copal or copalillo, is a species of shrub or small tree native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Bursera crenata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Bursera crenata is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or resin, which can be used to make herbal preparations such as cough syrups, expectorants, and topical creams to soothe skin irritations.
